rationale: The cited 2002 JMR paper appears highly relevant to the 2008 paper’s core theory and mechanisms: both center on issue capability effects, risk-taking behavior, and attention to upside/downside potential. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior issue-capability research and tests similar process constructs (e.g., upside-focused thoughts), so this is plausibly a foundational/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
